MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD
Off Calendar Sep-10-2021 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE:
William Brown, Esq. (760-672-0084), Moving party.
Dana Garber, Esq. (805-988-9200) of Schaeffer Cota Rosen LLP for Defendant.

Hearing is held (as fully reported in the reporter's notes). The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD for PLAINTIFFS ANTHONY ROHWEDDER and AUDREY ROHWEDDER is GRANTED. Moving party to submit a proposed order on judicial council form.

Judge: Richard Ulmer, Clerk: S. Le, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com, Reported. =(302/RBU)
